results.title: Watch: Gill shares a heartwarming moment with parents after GT reach Final
results.description: Shubman Gill's spectacular century powered Gujarat Titans to a record-breaking chase in IPL 2026 Qualifier 2, securing their spot in the final. He was celebrated with his family after the thrilling 7-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals. The Titans now head to Ahmedabad to face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a highly anticipated title clash.

results.title: Two CRPF officials die of suspected cardiac arrest in camps in J-K’s Pulwama, Shopian
results.description: Srinagar, May 30: Two CRPF officers died due suspected cardiac arrest in their camps in Pulwama and Shopian districts of Jammu and Kashmir on Friday, officials said. Inspector Tejpal Singh, a resident of Haryana, was found unconscious at the the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) Regional Training Centre, Lethpora, in Pulwama around 5.00 pm. Officials [...]

results.title: Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge rules
results.description: "The Kennedy Center is an institution that belongs to the American people, not to Donald Trump," said Rep. Joyce Beatty, who sued over the renaming. Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge rules

results.title: AI giants make aggressive India pitches
results.description: India News: MUMBAI: The India heads of AI world's arch-rivals Anthropic and OpenAI took to the stage at the annual Tech Week here, pitching their suite of product.
